bug.description: Create a bug issue with standard template (project)

extensionPoints.purpose: Add custom discovery sources or configure catalog parameters before scanning

extensionPoints.purpose: Enrich or filter discovered elements before specification

extensionPoints.purpose: Add post-catalog actions such as generating reports or updating cross-references

ci.description: Manage GitHub Actions CI workflows interactively (project)

extensionPoints.name: pre-add
extensionPoints.purpose: Add custom validation or transformation before a CI feature is added to the workflow

extensionPoints.name: post-add

extensionPoints.purpose: Run post-add actions such as testing the workflow or notifying the team

extensionPoints.location: /ci recommend subcommand, before analyzing project stack
extensionPoints.purpose: Inject custom signals or constraints before CI recommendations are generated

extensionPoints.name: post-recommend
extensionPoints.purpose: Add follow-up actions after recommendations are applied

extensionPoints.name: custom-subcommands
extensionPoints.purpose: Register custom CI subcommands beyond the built-in add/recommend/status
